name: fleet-orchestration
nudge: [GOAL REMINDER] Active goal: orchestrate Aralia work through the AI-agent fleet. Read .agent/orchestration/TRACKER.md for fleet readiness, dispatch rules, and the dispatch log — trust its dated statuses. Flow: keep the dashboard (misc/agent_matrix.html) current, pick open Aralia work (e.g. .agent/resume-journey/TRACKER.md tasks 3-5, worldforge lane), dispatch to the cheapest capable agent with a self-contained spec, verify the result yourself (tests + diff review), log the dispatch. Respect usage limits: check /api/agent-usage before dispatching; fall back per the rules when an agent runs dry.
